What We Offer

Our Services

Serene Hospice LLC offers a comprehensive continuum of care, available to patients of any age, religion, and race. Each plan is tailored by our interdisciplinary team.

🩺
Clinical Services

Medical & Clinical Care

👨‍⚕️

Medical Care

Physician visits to monitor, manage, and coordinate overall patient care.

Learn more →
🩺

Skilled Nursing

Registered and licensed nurses providing clinical assessments, treatments, and symptom management.

Learn more →
🏃

Therapy Evaluations

Physical, occupational, and speech therapy evaluations to maximize function and comfort.

Learn more →
💊

Medications & Supplies

All necessary medical equipment, supplies, and hospice-related medications provided and delivered.

Learn more →
💛
Holistic Support

Emotional, Spiritual & Family Support

🤝

Social Worker Services

Helping families navigate emotional, financial, and practical challenges with counseling and community resources.

Learn more →
🙏

Spiritual Counseling

Chaplains and spiritual care coordinators providing faith-sensitive support to patients and families.

Learn more →
💛

Bereavement & Grief Support

Ongoing counseling and grief resources for families before and after the loss of a loved one.

Learn more →
👨‍👩‍👧

Caregiver Training

Teaching family caregivers the skills and confidence to provide safe, effective care at home.

Learn more →
🌟

Volunteer Support

Trained volunteers offering companionship, errands, and temporary family relief.

Learn more →
🚨
Advanced Support

Crisis & Inpatient Care

🚨

24-Hour Crisis Care

Continuous at-home care during medical crises, with 24/7 on-call nursing support. Our team responds immediately when a patient needs urgent attention.

Learn more →
🏨

Short-Term Inpatient Care

Acute inpatient and respite care for pain crises or caregiver relief at skilled nursing facilities, with continuous monitoring and family support throughout.

Learn more →

Ready to Learn More?

Our team is available to answer your questions and help determine the right care plan. Admissions are based on patient need. Admissions are never based on ability to pay.

Contact Us Insurance Coverage

Compassionate, patient-centered end-of-life care throughout the greater Los Angeles area.
